next_steps: Initiate high-dose intravenous glucocorticoids for optic nerve protection and control of inflammation
Perform orbital biopsy of the affected tissue for histopathology and IgG4/IgG ratio staining
Order serum ANCA, ANA, ENA, and ANCA vasculitis workup
Order serum AQP4 and MOG antibody testing
Request formal re-review of the previous abdominal skin biopsy by a dermatopathologist specialized in connective tissue disease and IgG4-RD
Consult rheumatology for systemic evaluation of potential IgG4-related disease
